channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Two small flimsy bits of possibly a tent and a screen, each about 1m x 20cm x 2cm deep are on the footway of Cator Rd, Penge about 8m and 10m from the jct with Lennard Rd - near Holy Trinity church., 27th May
item.description:
Two small flimsy bits of possibly a tent and a screen, each about 1m x 20cm x 2cm deep are on the footway of Cator Rd, Penge about 8m and 10m from the jct with Lennard Rd - near Holy Trinity church.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Lennard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 47 Lordship Lane (in front,) a bent road sign, 27th May
item.description:
A road sign that us bent to the point if near collapse. Needs to be straightened as it is dangerous.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 47, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A4 laminated ad for an 'app' is flyposted on and affixed to the Queen Adelaide Court boundary railings at the jct of Penge Lane and Queen Adelaide Rd., 27th May
item.description:
A4 laminated ad for an 'app' is flyposted on and affixed to the Queen Adelaide Court boundary railings at the jct of Penge Lane and Queen Adelaide Rd.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen Adelaide Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubble left by garage entrance, 27th May
item.description:
Many bags of rubble have been dumped next to the entrance to the garages under Yaldham House, in Massinger Street. Flytipping is an almost daily problem at the side or back of Yaldham House

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 140, Old Kent Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: About 0.75 sqm of tags on the grey rear of the two pole directions sign at about 2.5m height, fronting Sainsbury's High Street Penge., 27th May
item.description:
About 0.75 sqm of tags on the grey rear of the two pole directions sign at about 2.5m height, fronting Sainsbury's High Street Penge. A prolific A4 laminated promotional flyposted ad for an 'app' is also affixed to a pole at ground level.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 59 Lordship Lane-Flytipping-5th complaint, 27th May
item.description:
5th Complaint: Wooden boards should not be on the high street and should be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 59, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chesterfield Grove (Along wall of Joe the Juice)-Flytipping-6th Complaint, 27th May
item.description:
6th Complaint: It is completely unacceptable that this is a site for dumping/non-removal of a toilet tank lid 1 pallet added and now another. Nothing is being done about its removal and it has now encouraged more flytipping and inappropriate disposal. The fact that it is a street full of young children and the health and safety is dismissed is shocking. The Duty of Care is not being demonstrated of not enforcing the law towards the organisation or residence in regards to the responsible manner of rubbish disposal/removal, where it will encourage unhygienic practices.This sends a message that this conduct has no accountability. Health and safety of the residents and wider community should be paramount, not ignored.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Chesterfield Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lordship Lane - Litter Bin (outside Joe the Juice) overflowing with waste, 27th May
item.description:
The bin needs to be emptied due to waste not properly dispensed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 96, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees need cutting, 27th May
item.description:
Can get past with out getting green
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Jessam Avenue, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chesterfield Grove (next to car wash)-Bin overflowing with wast. 3rd Complaint, 27th May
item.description:
3rd Complaint: Now a 2nd bin is overflowing with waste aswell as the 1st bin. It is a health and safety concern as it will attract vermin. It has to be emptied.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Chesterfield Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 27th May
item.description:
Graffiti on bike bunker, needs removed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kinfauns Road, West Norwood, Greater London

item.title: Overflowing bin by bus stop, 27th May
item.description:
Bin full

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cazenove Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Large discarded car part, 27th May
item.description:
Large part of what looks like a car discarded on payment. My toddler didn't see it and tripped over it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farnaby Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement blocked, 27th May
item.description:
Narrow pavement already obstructed by overgrown vegetation is now being completely blocked by someone chaining their bike to the lamppost

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sanford Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned van 4+ years now, 27th May
item.description:
There is a renault master van abandoned for many years now are you lazy losers gonna deal with this or not??????
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Vicarage Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cars blocking fire access and drive, 27th May
item.description:
Many cars blocking fire and emergency access and driveway to garages. Happens almost every evening.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is a dead fox outside my house, 27th May
item.description:
I’ve put it in a couple of bin bags and left it near the front of my house. It is no. 18
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Park, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 8 matrices and so much other rubbish, 27th May
item.description:
This has been like it for about 2 months now. I’ve had 3 surveyors decline my loan against my property because of this in the area making it a risk to lend against. It’s disgusting and is dumped various places around the estate. It’s all over Longfield estate. Se1

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Balaclava Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter all over Dickens Fields, 27th May
item.description:
Litter left all over Dickens Field park today - foot, plastic, paper, leftovers from picnics etc. Please send litter pickers to park.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dickens Square, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign needs to be removed as work finished, 27th May
item.description:
Left when work was going on a few weeks’ ago. Also a sign by railway bridge to do with same work.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Gardens, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
